cores.note: sysctl hw.perflevel0 = Super (P), hw.perflevel1 = Efficiency (E). Optimize for P-core (perflevel0) numbers unless targeting background workloads.

cache.note: P-core L1D = 128 KiB, L2 = 16 MiB (shared across 4 P-cores). Apple silicon uses a 128-byte cache line vs the more common 64. No dedicated L3 exposed via sysctl.

pipeline.note: Apple firestorm-lineage estimate: fmla.4s latency ~3 cycles, ~4 FMA units per P-core cycle (peak 32 fp32-flops/cycle/core). Verify with microbench before using as a hard budget.
